records.description: 1. These estimates are for frame and shell only. 2. Duckbill anchors furnished with basic tension fabric structures are for unpaved surfaces only. 3. For asphalt and concrete surfaces, use expansion-type anchors. 4. Refer to other divisions for estimates on footings, utilities, and other components of work. 5. Refer to manufacturers’ specifications and installation instructions.
